description: Per-species MI/MA HCD catalog coverage state. Written by DATA-GAP-MIMA-18 extraction. Updated by ETL scripts at load time (row_count_actual backfilled via SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hcd_mi_incidence WHERE species = ?).

CYNO.notes: Full cyno MI coverage from Chamanza 2010 (570 animals, 60 studies 2003-2009, Charles River Edinburgh). Tables 2-7 cover cardiovascular/respiratory/digestive/urogenital/endocrine/hematopoietic/skin/MSK/nervous systems.

BEAGLE.missing: DATA-GAP-MIMA-21 (Chandra 2010 or equivalent Beagle HCD source) -- original spec citation unverifiable
BEAGLE.notes: Partial Beagle MI coverage from Maita 1977 (420 animals, Sankyo Japan, pre-INHAND-1977 terminology, paper-aggregate denominator without sex stratification). 5 organs covered (liver, thyroid, spleen, pituitary, prostate); major gaps: kidney, heart, lung, lymphoid, MSK, nervous. Sato 2012 available but is a photomicrograph atlas with no quantitative incidence tables -- not emittable without fabrication.
